global_rules: No purple or violet colors anywhere.
No soft rounded corners (border-radius: 0 or extremely minimal like 2px).
All interactive UI elements MUST have a data-testid attribute.
UI feels like a tactical military interface: monospaced numbers, corner brackets, harsh lines.

typography.rules: Use system monospace for HUD/Tactical data. Use imported Black Ops One or heavy system sans-serif for titles.

fonts.title: 'Black Ops One', 'Stardos Stencil', or System Heavy/Black
fonts.body: System Sans-Serif, uppercase for UI labels

gameplay_graphics.player: A sharp, elongated white triangle (arrow) indicating direction.
gameplay_graphics.rig: A central glowing cyan Hexagon. Pulsing opacity.
gameplay_graphics.zombies: Simple circles (blobs) with a sickly toxic green fill and thick dark-green outline.
gameplay_graphics.scrap: Tiny rust-orange squares or diamonds scattered on the ground.
gameplay_graphics.environment: Dark dirty brown/grey background with sparse geometric scratches or darker dots indicating wasteland terrain.

ui_surfaces.menus: Hard, rectangular panels. Dark translucent backgrounds (panel_bg) with solid 1px Rust Orange borders.
ui_surfaces.decorations: Use corner brackets `[  ]` or `+` crosshairs in the corners of UI boundaries to simulate HUD visors.

main_menu.layout: Centered alignment. Massive stencil title 'LAST SCRAP'. Glowing subtitle.
elements: Start Button: Sharp rectangle, 1px border, hover/active state fills with cyan.

gameplay_hud.layout: Absolute positioned elements at screen edges to avoid blocking the arena.
gameplay_hud.top_left: Player HP bar (angular, segmented) and Scrap Count (Nut Icon + Monospace integer).
gameplay_hud.top_right: Wave Number [ W-01 ] and RIG Integrity %.
gameplay_hud.bottom_left: Virtual Joystick area. Translucent white circles.
gameplay_hud.bottom_right: Pause Button and optional manual fire override (if needed, otherwise blank).

elements: Cards: Grid of upgrade options (Player HP, RIG Armor, Fire Rate, Damage).
Card Style: 1px border, monospaced cost, icon on the left.
Action: 'DEPLOY' button to start next wave.

pause_game_over.layout: Centered modal. Red-tinted overlay for Game Over.
elements: Stats readout: Waves survived, Total Scrap collected, Kill count.

joystick.visuals: Outer ring: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2). Inner thumb: Solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5) circle. No gradients.

health_bar.visuals: Not rounded. Segmented blocks. Example: [||||||    ]. Background dark red, active bright red.

tactical_button.visuals: Padding 16px. Background transparent. Border 1px solid Rust Orange. Text Uppercase, Monospace. On press: Background Rust Orange, Text Black.

motion.ui_transitions: Instant or very fast (100ms) rigid wipes. No bouncy spring animations.
motion.gameplay_feedback: Flash screen edges dark red on player damage. Flash RIG cyan on RIG damage.
motion.zombie_death: Shrink scale to 0 quickly (150ms) and drop a scrap square.
